title: CSS Transitions
content:
### CSS Transitions

**Transitions** smoothly change property values over time.

---

### Syntax

```css
.element {
  transition: property duration timing-function delay;
}
```

---

### Transition Properties

| Property | Description | Example |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| `transition-property` | Which property to animate | `opacity`, `transform`, `all` |
| `transition-duration` | How long | `0.3s`, `500ms` |
| `transition-timing-function` | Speed curve | `ease`, `linear`, `ease-in-out` |
| `transition-delay` | Wait before start | `0.1s`, `0ms` |
| `transition` | Shorthand | `all 0.3s ease` |

---

### Basic Example

```css
.button {
  background: blue;
  color: white;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.button:hover {
  background: darkblue;
  transform: scale(1.05);
}
```

---

### Timing Functions

| Function | Curve |
|----------|-------|
| `ease` | Slow start, fast middle, slow end (default) |
| `linear` | Same speed throughout |
| `ease-in` | Slow start, fast end |
| `ease-out` | Fast start, slow end |
| `ease-in-out` | Slow start and end |
| `cubic-bezier(n,n,n,n)` | Custom curve |
| `steps(n)` | Step-based animation |

---

### Multiple Properties

```css
.box {
  transition: 
    opacity 0.3s ease,
    transform 0.5s ease-in-out,
    background-color 0.2s linear;
}
```

---

### Transitionable Properties

Common properties you can transition:

| Category | Properties |
|----------|-----------|
| Visual | `opacity`, `color`, `background` |
| Box | `width`, `height`, `margin`, `padding` |
| Border | `border-color`, `border-radius`, `border-width` |
| Transform | `transform`, `scale()`, `rotate()`, `translate()` |
| Layout | `flex`, `grid` gap changes |
| Shadow | `box-shadow`, `text-shadow` |
| Filter | `filter`, `backdrop-filter` |

---

### Transition Trigger

Transitions need a **trigger** (state change):

```css
/* Hover */
.element:hover { }

/* Focus */
.element:focus { }

/* Active */
.element:active { }

/* Class toggle (via JS) */
.element.active { }
```

> **Best Practice:** Keep transitions under 0.5s. Use `transform` and `opacity` for performant animations (GPU-accelerated).
codeExample: Hover me

quiz.question: What is the default timing function for transitions?
